intended_use: The system is used to perform image guidance in diagnostic, intervention and surgical procedures. Procedures that can be performed with the system include cardiac angiography, neuro-angiography, vascu
intended_use_full: The system is used to perform image guidance in diagnostic, intervention and surgical procedures. Procedures that can be performed with the system include cardiac angiography, neuro-angiography, vascular and non-vascular angiography, rotational angiography and whole body radiographic/fluoroscopic procedures.
ground_truth: Phantoms (geometric phantom, Catphan700, chest phantom, head phantom, CTDI dosimetry phantom, body phantom); DSA and CT/CTA/MR imaging for registration studies; clinical evaluation by ADR-certified radiologist
other_metrics: Image Registration Algorithm (Fusion): mean target registration error (mTRE) < pixel diagonal distance (sub-pixel accuracy achieved). Neuro Registration Algorithm (3D Roadmap): mTRE < 1 mm. DSA Algorithm: submillimeter vessel visualization across all copper step wedges. uSpace collision detection: specified detection rate achieved. uLingo wake-up accuracy: ≥95% at SNR ≥15 dB(A), ≥85% at SNR 10 dB(A). uLingo command recognition: ≥95% success rate at SNR ≥15 dB(A), ≥85% at SNR 10 dB(A). Clinical image evaluation: all images scored ≥3 on 5-point scale (PASS result).
